Description: System-generated unique identifier for the content module
Learning objective identifier linking to Learning Graph node
Validation_Rules: Must match valid LearningObjective.lo_id in graph

Description: Aligned educational standards with codes and proficiency levels
Validation_Rules: At least one standard code required

Description: Human-readable title for teacher/learner display
Full learning objective statement addressed by this content
Example_Value: Explain why a fraction a/b is equivalent to a fraction nxa/nxb

Description: Learning objectives that must be mastered before this content
Validation_Rules: All IDs must exist in Learning Graph

Description: Calibrated difficulty using IRT (0=easiest; 1=hardest)
Validation_Rules: Range [0.0 1.0] derived from item response theory

Description: Discrete difficulty level within the learning objective (1-5)
Webb's Depth of Knowledge level (1-4)
CLT-informed design parameters for this content
Pedagogical purpose of the content
Validation_Rules: Values: exposition worked_example practice_problem assessment enrichment remediation

Description: Primary media format for delivery
Validation_Rules: Values: interactive video text audio manipulative mixed

Description: Content module IDs offering same objective in different formats
Validation_Rules: All referenced modules must share same lo_id

Description: Learning modality tags for content discovery - NOT for VARK/MI routing per Pashler et al. 2008
Validation_Rules: Values from controlled vocabulary: visual_representation audio_narration text_based interactive_manipulative worked_example collaborative

Description: Typical time for target learner to complete
Conditions for marking objective mastered via this content
Available accessibility accommodations
Available language localizations
Cross-language cognate pairs for ELL support
Validation_Rules: Required if language_variants present for ELL

Description: Progressive hint structure with content references
Embedded assessment item IDs for mastery verification
Associated visual media asset IDs
Validation_Rules: All assets must have alt text per WCAG

Description: Associated audio asset IDs for TTS or narration
Validation_Rules: Required if content_format=audio or accessibility_features includes tts

Description: Interactive component definitions (manipulatives; sims)
Content schema version for this module
Semantic version of the pedagogical content
When this version became the default for new assignments
Validation_Rules: ISO 8601 date must be in past or present

Description: Previous content module ID this replaces
Rules for migrating student progress from superseded content
Creation and modification tracking
Search and discovery tags
External system identifiers (LTI; QTI; LOM)
Tags for A/B testing and efficacy analysis
